reviewText: I've been buying saffron for 20 years and always worried about getting fake kesar. With Saffron Town I finally found pure Kashmiri saffron I can trust,the colour it gives to rice is incomparable. You can tell immediately this is original Kashmiri saffron and not something mixed with turmeric or dye. Will never buy from anywhere else.

My gynaecologist suggested I start taking kesar during pregnancy from the 5th month onward. I was very particular about finding saffron that was genuinely pure,I didn't want anything adulterated going into my body. Saffron Town's lab certificate gave me complete peace of mind. The kashmiri kesar arrived beautifully packed and the threads are deep crimson. I make warm kesar milk every night and it has been wonderful.

I started drinking kesar milk every morning after reading about the benefits and wanted to make sure I was using quality saffron. The difference with Saffron Town is immediately obvious,even 4–5 threads turn the milk a rich golden colour within minutes. I've noticed better sleep and my skin looks noticeably brighter. The kesar milk benefits people talk about are real, but only if the saffron itself is genuine.

I specifically looked for Mongra saffron after learning it's the highest grade,only the stigma, no yellow thread attached. Most sellers claim to sell Mongra but when you compare them side-by-side you can tell. Saffron Town's Mongra is the real thing. Incredibly potent,I use half the amount I used to. If you want the best Kashmiri saffron available online, this is it.

I work in food quality and I know how easy it is to sell adulterated saffron online. I did the water test, the baking soda test, and checked the smell before I was convinced,this is real saffron, not fake. The fact that they publish ISO 3632 lab reports for every batch is something I've never seen any other Indian saffron brand do. This is what GI certified Kashmiri saffron should look like.

After my first delivery I was so weak I could barely hold my baby. My doctor said start saffron early next time. For my second pregnancy I began with 3–4 strands of pure Kashmiri saffron in warm water every morning on empty stomach from the 6th month. The second delivery was so much smoother. I recovered faster too. This farm direct saffron from Pampore made all the difference.

I used to catch colds and infections every month. After three months of kesar milk with this kashmiri kesar my immunity has really improved. I haven't had a single throat infection this winter. The threads dissolve properly,you can tell it's lab tested saffron. My wife uses it for her skin glow and we both feel the difference. Farm-direct quality matters.

Post-partum depression hit me hard with my first child. This time my mother forced me to take kesar in milk from day one. The mood lift is real,I feel calmer and more present with my newborn. This pure Kashmiri saffron from Saffron Town is the only one I trusted during pregnancy and now. Genuine GI tagged saffron makes a difference you can feel.
